BATT7_OPTIONS.d:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap

BATT7_SERIAL_NUM.d: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.

BATT7_SHUNT.d:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01

BATT7_SUM_MASK.d:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9

BATT7_VLT_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied

BATT7_VOLT_MULT.d: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATT7_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).

BATT7_VOLT_PIN.n: Battery Voltage sensing pin on the AD7091R5 Ic
BATT7_VOLT_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATT8_AMP_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor

BATT8_AMP_PERVLT.d: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.

BATT8_ARM_MAH.d: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATT8_ARM_VOLT parameter.

BATT8_ARM_VOLT.d: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.

BATT8_CAPACITY.d: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full

BATT8_CHANNEL.d:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3

BATT8_CRT_MAH.d: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT8_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATT8_CRT_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT8_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT8_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATT8_CURR_MULT.d:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10

BATT8_CURR_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATTA_CRT_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTA_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTA_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATTA_CURR_MULT.d:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10

BATTA_CURR_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATTA_ESC_INDEX.n: ESC Telemetry Index to write to
BATTA_ESC_INDEX.d:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10

BATTA_ESC_MASK.d:
If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

位定义:
  位0: ESC 1
  位1: ESC 2
  位2: ESC 3
  位3: ESC 4
  位4: ESC 5

BATTA_FL_FF.d:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTA_FL_FLTR.d:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1

BATTA_FL_FS.d:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTA_FL_FT.d:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTA_FL_OFF.d:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTA_FL_PIN.d:
Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator

BATTA_FL_VLT_MIN.d:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10

BATTA_FL_V_MULT.d:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10

BATTA_FS_CRT_ACT.d:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land

BATTA_FS_LOW_ACT.d:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land

BATTA_FS_VOLTSRC.d:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage

BATTA_I2C_ADDR.d:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127

BATTA_I2C_BUS.d:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3

BATTA_LOW_MAH.d: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTA_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.

BATTA_LOW_TIMER.d:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120

BATTA_LOW_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTA_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTA_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.

BATTA_MAX_AMPS.d:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400

BATTA_MAX_VOLT.d:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100

BATTA_MONITOR.d:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT
  21: INA2XX (INA226 INA228 INA238 INA231 INA260)
  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC

BATTA_OPTIONS.d:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap

BATTA_SERIAL_NUM.d: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.

BATTA_SHUNT.d:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01

BATTA_SUM_MASK.d:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9

BATTA_VLT_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied

BATTA_VOLT_MULT.d: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATTA_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).

BATTA_VOLT_PIN.n: Battery Voltage sensing pin on the AD7091R5 Ic
BATTA_VOLT_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATTB_AMP_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor

BATTB_AMP_PERVLT.d: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.

BATTB_ARM_MAH.d: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATTB_ARM_VOLT parameter.

BATTB_ARM_VOLT.d: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.

BATTB_CAPACITY.d: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full

BATTB_CHANNEL.d:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3

  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap

BATTC_SERIAL_NUM.d: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.

BATTC_SHUNT.d:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01

BATTC_SUM_MASK.d:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9

BATTC_VLT_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied

BATTC_VOLT_MULT.d: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATTC_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).

BATTC_VOLT_PIN.n: Battery Voltage sensing pin on the AD7091R5 Ic
BATTC_VOLT_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATTD_AMP_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor

BATTD_AMP_PERVLT.d: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.

BATTD_ARM_MAH.d: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATTD_ARM_VOLT parameter.

BATTD_ARM_VOLT.d: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.

BATTD_CAPACITY.d: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full

BATTD_CHANNEL.d:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3

BATTD_CRT_MAH.d: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTD_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATTD_CRT_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTD_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTD_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATTD_CURR_MULT.d:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10

BATTD_CURR_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATTD_ESC_INDEX.n: ESC Telemetry Index to write to
BATTD_ESC_INDEX.d:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10

BATTD_ESC_MASK.d:
If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

位定义:
  位0: ESC 1
  位1: ESC 2
  位2: ESC 3
  位3: ESC 4
  位4: ESC 5

  位31: ESC 32

BATTD_FL_FF.d:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTD_FL_FLTR.d:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1

BATTD_FL_FS.d:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTD_FL_FT.d:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTD_FL_OFF.d:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATTD_FL_PIN.d:
Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator

BATTD_FL_VLT_MIN.d:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10

BATTD_FL_V_MULT.d:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10

BATTD_FS_CRT_ACT.d:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land

BATTD_FS_LOW_ACT.d:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land

BATTD_FS_VOLTSRC.d:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage

BATTD_I2C_ADDR.d:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127

BATTD_I2C_BUS.d:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3

BATTD_LOW_MAH.d: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTD_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.

BATTD_LOW_TIMER.d:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120

BATTD_LOW_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTD_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTD_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.

BATTD_MAX_AMPS.d:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400

BATTD_MAX_VOLT.d:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100

BATTD_MONITOR.d:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT

  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC

BATTF_LOW_MAH.d: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTF_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.

This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

BATTF_LOW_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTF_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTF_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.

BATTF_OPTIONS.d:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap

BATTF_SERIAL_NUM.d: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.

BATTF_SHUNT.d:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01

BATTF_SUM_MASK.d:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9

BATTF_VLT_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied

BATTF_VOLT_MULT.d: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATTF_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).

BATTF_VOLT_PIN.n: Battery Voltage sensing pin on the AD7091R5 Ic
BATTF_VOLT_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled

BATTG_AMP_OFFSET.d: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor

BATTG_AMP_PERVLT.d: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.

BATTG_ARM_MAH.d: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATTG_ARM_VOLT parameter.

BATTG_ARM_VOLT.d: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.

BATTG_CAPACITY.d: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full

BATTG_CHANNEL.d:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3

BATTG_CRT_MAH.d: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTG_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATTG_CRT_VOLT.d: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTG_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTG_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATTG_CURR_MULT.d:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10

BATTG_CURR_PIN.d:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:

First order polynomial fit term

BATTG_FL_FLTR.d:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

BATTG_FL_FS.d:
Second order polynomial fit term

Third order polynomial fit term

BATTG_FL_OFF.d:

Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

  100: PX4-v1

  5: Navigator

BATTG_FL_VLT_MIN.d:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10

BATTG_FL_V_MULT.d:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10

What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land

Beacon origin's altitude above sealevel in meters

范围: 0 … 10000

BCN_ORIENT_YAW.n: Beacon systems rotation from north in degrees
BCN_ORIENT_YAW.d:
Beacon systems rotation from north in degrees

范围: -180 … +180

BCN_TYPE.n: Beacon based position estimation device type
BCN_TYPE.d:
What type of beacon based position estimation device is connected

取值:
  0: None
  1: Pozyx
  10: SITL
  2: Marvelmind
  3: Nooploop

BRD_ALT_CONFIG.d:
Select an alternative hardware configuration. A value of zero selects the default configuration for this board. Other values are board specific. Please see the documentation for your board for details on any alternative configuration values that may be available.

范围: 0 … 10

BRD_BOOT_DELAY.d:
This adds a delay in milliseconds to boot to ensure peripherals initialise fully

范围: 0 … 10000

BRD_HEAT_I.d:
Board Heater integrator gain

范围: 0 … 1

BRD_HEAT_IMAX.d:
Board Heater integrator maximum

范围: 0 … 100

BRD_HEAT_LOWMGN.d:
Arming check will fail if temp is lower than this margin below BRD_HEAT_TARG. 0 disables the low temperature check

范围: 0 … 20

BRD_HEAT_P.d:
Board Heater P gain

范围: 1 … 500

BRD_HEAT_TARG.d:
Board heater target temperature for boards with controllable heating units. Set to -1 to disable the heater, please reboot after setting to -1.

范围: -1 … 80

BRD_IDLE_STATS.n: Capture and calculate true CPU load using idle threads
BRD_IDLE_STATS.d:
Capture and calculate true CPU load using idle threads

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable

BRD_IO_DSHOT.d:
This loads the DShot firmware on the IO co-processor

取值:
  0: StandardFW
  1: DshotFW

BRD_IO_ENABLE.d:
This allows for the IO co-processor on boards with an IOMCU to be disabled. Setting to 2 will enable the IOMCU but not attempt to update firmware on startup

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: EnableNoFWUpdate

BRD_OPTIONS.d:
Board specific option flags

位定义:
  位0: Enable hardware watchdog
  位1: Disable MAVftp
  位2: Enable set of internal parameters
  位3: Enable Debug Pins
  位4: Unlock flash on reboot
  位5: Write protect firmware flash on reboot
  位6: Write protect bootloader flash on reboot
  位7: Skip board validation
  位8: Disable board arming gpio output change on arm/disarm
  位9: Use safety pins as profiled

BRD_PWM_VOLT_SEL.d:
This sets the voltage max for PWM output pulses. 0 for 3.3V and 1 for 5V output. On boards with an IOMCU that support this parameter this option only affects the 8 main outputs, not the 6 auxiliary outputs. Using 5V output can help to reduce the impact of ESC noise interference corrupting signals to the ESCs.

取值:
  0: 3.3V
  1: 5V

BRD_SAFETYOPTION.d:
This controls the activation of the safety button. It allows you to control if the safety button can be used for safety enable and/or disable, and whether the button is only active when disarmed

位定义:
  位0: ActiveForSafetyDisable
  位1: ActiveForSafetyEnable
  位2: ActiveWhenArmed
  位3: Force safety on when the aircraft disarms

BRD_SAFETY_DEFLT.n: Sets default state of the safety switch
BRD_SAFETY_DEFLT.d:
This controls the default state of the safety switch at startup. When set to 1 the safety switch will start in the safe state (flashing) at boot. When set to zero the safety switch will start in the unsafe state (solid) at startup. Note that if a safety switch is fitted the user can still control the safety state after startup using the switch. The safety state can also be controlled in software using a MAVLink message.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

BRD_SAFETY_MASK.n: Outputs which ignore the safety switch state
BRD_SAFETY_MASK.d:
A bitmask which controls what outputs can move while the safety switch has not been pressed

位定义:
  位0: Output1
  位1: Output2
  位2: Output3
  位3: Output4
  位4: Output5
  位5: Output6
  位6: Output7
  位7: Output8
  位8: Output9
  位9: Output10
  位10: Output11
  位11: Output12
  位12: Output13
  位13: Output14
  位14: Output15
  位15: Output16
  位16: Output17
  位17: Output18
  位18: Output19
  位19: Output20
  位20: Output21
  位21: Output22
  位22: Output23
  位23: Output24
  位24: Output25
  位25: Output26
  位26: Output27
  位27: Output28
  位28: Output29
  位29: Output30
  位30: Output31
  位31: Output32

BRD_SBUS_OUT.d:
This sets the SBUS output frame rate in Hz

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: 50Hz
  2: 75Hz
  3: 100Hz
  4: 150Hz
  5: 200Hz
  6: 250Hz
  7: 300Hz

BRD_SD_FENCE.d:
This sets the amount of storage in kilobytes reserved on the microsd card in fence.stg for fence storage.

范围: 0 … 64

BRD_SD_MISSION.d:
This sets the amount of storage in kilobytes reserved on the microsd card in mission.stg for waypoint storage. Each waypoint uses 15 bytes.

范围: 0 … 64

BRD_SD_SLOWDOWN.d:
This is a scaling factor to slow down microSD operation. It can be used on flight board and microSD card combinations where full speed is not reliable. For normal full speed operation a value of 0 should be used.

范围: 0 … 32

BRD_SER1_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 1 (telemetry 1). You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup. Note that the PX4v1 does not have hardware flow control pins on this port, so you should leave this disabled.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER2_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 2 (telemetry 2). You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER3_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 3. You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER4_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 4. You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER5_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 5. You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER6_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 6. You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER7_RTSCTS.d:
Enable flow control on serial 7. You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
  2: Auto
  3: RS-485 Driver enable RTS pin

BRD_SER8_RTSCTS.d: Enable flow control on serial 8. You must have the RTS and CTS pins connected to your radio. The standard DF13 6 pin connector for a 3DR radio does have those pins connected. If this is set to 2 then flow control will be auto-detected by checking for the output buffer filling on startup.

BRD_SERIAL_NUM.d:
User-defined serial number of this vehicle, it can be any arbitrary number you want and has no effect on the autopilot

范围: -8388608 … 8388607

BRD_TYPE.d:
This allows selection of a PX4 or VRBRAIN board type. If set to zero then the board type is auto-detected (PX4)

取值:
  0: AUTO
  1: PX4V1
  100: PX4 OLDDRIVERS
  13: Intel Aero FC
  14: Pixhawk Pro
  2: Pixhawk
  20: AUAV2.1
  3: Cube/Pixhawk2
  39: PX4 FMUV6
  5: PixhawkMini
  6: Pixhawk2Slim

BRD_VBUS_MIN.d:
Minimum voltage on the autopilot power rail to allow the aircraft to arm. 0 to disable the check.

范围: 4.0 … 5.5

BRD_VSERVO_MIN.d:
Minimum voltage on the servo rail to allow the aircraft to arm. 0 to disable the check.

范围: 3.3 … 12.0

BRD_RADIO_ABLVL.d:
This sets the minimum RSSI of an auto-bind packet for it to be accepted. This should be set so that auto-bind will only happen at short range to minimise the change of an auto-bind happening accidentially

范围: 0 … 31

BRD_RADIO_ABTIME.d:
When non-zero this sets the time with no transmitter packets before we start looking for auto-bind packets.

范围: 0 … 120

BRD_RADIO_BZOFS.d:
Set transmitter buzzer note adjustment (adjust frequency up)

范围: 0 … 40

BRD_RADIO_DISCRC.d:
disable receive CRC (for debug)

取值:
  0: NotDisabled
  1: Disabled

BRD_RADIO_FCCTST.n: Put radio into FCC test mode
BRD_RADIO_FCCTST.d:
If this is enabled then the radio will continuously transmit as required for FCC testing. The transmit channel is set by the value of the parameter. The radio will not work for RC input while this is enabled

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: MinChannel
  2: MidChannel
  3: MaxChannel
  4: MinChannelCW
  5: MidChannelCW
  6: MaxChannelCW

BRD_RADIO_PPSCH.d:
Channel to show received packet-per-second rate, or zero for disabled

范围: 0 … 16

BRD_RADIO_PROT.d:
Select air protocol

取值:
  0: Auto
  1: DSM2
  2: DSMX

BRD_RADIO_SIGCH.d:
Channel to show receive RSSI signal strength, or zero for disabled

范围: 0 … 16

BRD_RADIO_STKMD.d:
This selects between different stick input modes. The default is mode2, which has throttle on the left stick and pitch on the right stick. You can instead set mode1, which has throttle on the right stick and pitch on the left stick.

取值:
  1: Mode1
  2: Mode2
  3: Mode3
  4: Mode4

BRD_RADIO_TELEM.d:
If this is non-zero then telemetry packets will be sent over DSM

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

BRD_RADIO_TESTCH.n: Set radio to factory test channel
BRD_RADIO_TESTCH.d:
This sets the radio to a fixed test channel for factory testing. Using a fixed channel avoids the need for binding in factory testing.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: TestChan1
  2: TestChan2
  3: TestChan3
  4: TestChan4
  5: TestChan5
  6: TestChan6
  7: TestChan7
  8: TestChan8

BRD_RADIO_TPPSCH.d:
Channel to show telemetry packets-per-second value, as received at TX

范围: 0 … 16

BRD_RADIO_TSIGCH.n: RSSI value channel for telemetry data on transmitter
BRD_RADIO_TSIGCH.d:
Channel to show telemetry RSSI value as received by TX

范围: 0 … 16

BRD_RADIO_TXMAX.d:
Set transmitter maximum transmit power (from 1 to 8)

范围: 1 … 8

BRD_RADIO_TXPOW.d:
Set telemetry transmit power. This is the power level (from 1 to 8) for telemetry packets sent from the RX to the TX

范围: 1 … 8

BRD_RADIO_TYPE.n: Set type of direct attached radio
BRD_RADIO_TYPE.d:
This enables support for direct attached radio receivers

取值:
  0: None
  1: CYRF6936
  2: CC2500
  3: BK2425

BRD_RTC_TYPES.d:
Specifies which sources of UTC time will be accepted

位定义:
  位0: GPS
  位1: MAVLINK_SYSTEM_TIME
  位2: HW

BRD_RTC_TZ_MIN.d:
Adds offset in +- minutes from UTC to calculate local time

范围: -720 … +840

BTN_ENABLE.d:
This enables the button checking module. When this is disabled the parameters for setting button inputs are not visible

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

  85: Generator
  9: Camera Trigger
  90: EKF Source Set
  94: VTX Power
  99: AUTO RTL

BTN_OPTIONS1.d:
Options for Pin 1. PWM input detects PWM above or below 1800/1200us instead of logic level. If PWM is not detected or is less than 800us or above 2200us the button will interpreted as low. Invert changes HIGH state to be logic low voltage on pin, or below 1200us, if PWM input.

位定义:
  位0: PWM Input
  位1: InvertInput

BTN_OPTIONS2.d:
Options for Pin 2. PWM input detects PWM above or below 1800/1200us instead of logic level. If PWM is not detected or is less than 800us or above 2200us the button will interpreted as low. Invert changes HIGH state to be logic low voltage on pin, or below 1200us, if PWM input.

位定义:
  位0: PWM Input
  位1: InvertInput

BTN_OPTIONS3.d:
Options for Pin 3. PWM input detects PWM above or below 1800/1200us instead of logic level. If PWM is not detected or is less than 800us or above 2200us the button will interpreted as low. Invert changes HIGH state to be logic low voltage on pin, or below 1200us, if PWM input.

位定义:
  位0: PWM Input
  位1: InvertInput

BTN_OPTIONS4.d:
Options for Pin 4. PWM input detects PWM above or below 1800/1200us instead of logic level. If PWM is not detected or is less than 800us or above 2200us the button will interpreted as low. Invert changes HIGH state to be logic low voltage on pin, or below 1200us, if PWM input.

位定义:
  位0: PWM Input
  位1: InvertInput

BTN_PIN1.d:
Digital pin number for first button input.  Some common values are given, but see the Wiki's "GPIOs" page for how to determine the pin number for a given autopilot.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  50: AUXOUT1
  51: AUXOUT2
  52: AUXOUT3
  53: AUXOUT4
  54: AUXOUT5
  55: AUXOUT6

BTN_REPORT_SEND.d:
The duration in seconds that a BUTTON_CHANGE report is repeatedly sent to the GCS regarding a button changing state. Note that the BUTTON_CHANGE message is MAVLink2 only.

范围: 0 … 3600

CAM_AUTO_ONLY.d:
When enabled, trigging by distance is done in AUTO mode only.

取值:
  0: Always
  1: Only when in AUTO

CAM_MAX_ROLL.d:
Postpone shooting if roll is greater than limit. (0=Disable, will shoot regardless of roll).

范围: 0 … 180

CAM1_DURATION.d:
Duration in seconds that the camera shutter is held open

范围: 0 … 5

CAM1_FEEDBAK_PIN.d:
pin number to use for save accurate camera feedback messages. If set to -1 then don't use a pin flag for this, otherwise this is a pin number which if held high after a picture trigger order, will save camera messages when camera really takes a picture. A universal camera hot shoe is needed. The pin should be held high for at least 2 milliseconds for reliable trigger detection.  Some common values are given, but see the Wiki's "GPIOs" page for how to determine the pin number for a given autopilot. See also the CAMx_FEEDBCK_POL option.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  50: AUX1
  51: AUX2
  52: AUX3
  53: AUX4
  54: AUX5
  55: AUX6

CAM1_FEEDBAK_POL.d:
Polarity for feedback pin. If this is 1 then the feedback pin should go high on trigger. If set to 0 then it should go low

取值:
  0: TriggerLow
  1: TriggerHigh

CAM1_HFOV.d:
Camera horizontal field of view. 0 if unknown

范围: 0 … 360

CAM1_INTRVAL_MIN.n: Camera minimum time interval between photos
CAM1_INTRVAL_MIN.d:
Postpone shooting if previous picture was taken less than this many seconds ago

范围: 0 … 10

CAM1_MNT_INST.d: Mount instance camera is associated with. 0 means camera and mount have identical instance numbers e.g. camera1 and mount1

CAM1_OPTIONS.d:
Camera options bitmask

位定义:
  位0: Recording Starts at arming and stops at disarming

CAM1_RELAY_ON.d:
This sets whether the relay goes high or low when it triggers. Note that you should also set RELAY_DEFAULT appropriately for your camera

取值:
  0: Low
  1: High

CAM1_SERVO_OFF.d:
PWM value in microseconds to move servo to when shutter is deactivated

范围: 1000 … 2000

CAM1_SERVO_ON.d:
PWM value in microseconds to move servo to when shutter is activated

范围: 1000 … 2000

CAM1_TRIGG_DIST.d:
Distance in meters between camera triggers. If this value is non-zero then the camera will trigger whenever the position changes by this number of meters regardless of what mode the APM is in. Note that this parameter can also be set in an auto mission using the DO_SET_CAM_TRIGG_DIST command, allowing you to enable/disable the triggering of the camera during the flight.

范围: 0 … 1000

CAM1_TYPE.d:
how to trigger the camera to take a picture

取值:
  0: None
  1: Servo
  2: Relay
  3: GoPro in Solo Gimbal
  4: Mount (Siyi/Topotek/Viewpro/Xacti)
  5: MAVLink
  6: MAVLinkCamV2 (Gremsy/AVT)
  7: Scripting
  8: RunCam

CAM1_VFOV.d:
Camera vertical field of view. 0 if unknown

范围: 0 … 180

CAM1_RC_BTN_DELY.n: RunCam button delay before allowing further button presses
CAM1_RC_BTN_DELY.d: Time it takes for the a RunCam button press to be actived in ms. If this is too short then commands can get out of sync.

CAM1_RC_BT_DELAY.n: RunCam boot delay before allowing updates
CAM1_RC_BT_DELAY.d: Time it takes for the RunCam to become fully ready in ms. If this is too short then commands can get out of sync.

CAM1_RC_CONTROL.d:
Specifies the allowed actions required to enter the OSD menu and other option like autorecording

位定义:
  位0: Stick yaw right
  位1: Stick roll right
  位2: 3-position switch
  位3: 2-position switch
  位4: Autorecording enabled

CAM1_RC_FEATURES.d:
The available features of the attached RunCam device. If 0 then the RunCam device will be queried for the features it supports, otherwise this setting is used.

位定义:
  位0: Power Button
  位1: WiFi Button
  位2: Change Mode
  位3: 5-Key OSD
  位4: Settings Access
  位5: DisplayPort
  位6: Start Recording
  位7: Stop Recording

CAM1_RC_MDE_DELY.n: RunCam mode delay before allowing further button presses
CAM1_RC_MDE_DELY.d: Time it takes for the a RunCam mode button press to be actived in ms. If a mode change first requires a video recording change then double this value is used. If this is too short then commands can get out of sync.

CAM1_RC_TYPE.d:
RunCam device type used to determine OSD menu structure and shutter options.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: RunCam Split Micro/RunCam with UART
  2: RunCam Split
  3: RunCam Split4 4k
  4: RunCam Hybrid/RunCam Thumb Pro
  5: Runcam 2 4k

CAN_D1_UC_ESC_OF.d:
Offset for ESC numbering in DroneCAN ESC RawCommand messages. This allows for more efficient packing of ESC command messages. If your ESCs are on servo outputs 5 to 8 and you set this parameter to 4 then the ESC RawCommand will be sent with the first 4 slots filled. This can be used for more efficient usage of CAN bandwidth

范围: 0 … 18

FF D Gain which produces an output that is proportional to the rate of change of the target

CC2_RAT_PIT_FF.d:

范围: 0 … 0.5

CC2_RAT_PIT_FLTD.d:
Pitch axis rate controller derivative frequency in Hz

CC2_RAT_PIT_FLTT.d:

Pitch axis rate controller I gain.  Corrects long-term difference in desired pitch rate vs actual pitch rate

范围: 0.01 … 2.0

CC2_RAT_PIT_IMAX.n: Pitch axis rate controller I gain maximum
CC2_RAT_PIT_IMAX.d:
Pitch axis rate controller I gain maximum.  Constrains the maximum that the I term will output

范围: 0 … 1

CC2_RAT_PIT_NEF.d:
Pitch Error notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

CC2_RAT_PIT_NTF.d:
Pitch Target notch filter index

范围: 1 … 8

CC2_RAT_PIT_P.n: Pitch axis rate controller P gain
CC2_RAT_PIT_P.d:
Pitch axis rate controller P gain.  Corrects in proportion to the difference between the desired pitch rate vs actual pitch rate

范围: 0.01 … 0.50

CC2_RAT_PIT_PDMX.n: Pitch axis rate controller PD sum maximum
CC2_RAT_PIT_PDMX.d:
Pitch axis rate controller PD sum maximum.  The maximum/minimum value that the sum of the P and D term can output

范围: 0 … 1

CC2_RAT_PIT_SMAX.d:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

范围: 0 … 200

CC2_RAT_RLL_D.d:
Roll axis rate controller D gain.  Compensates for short-term change in desired roll rate vs actual roll rate

CC2_RAT_RLL_FLTT.d:

CHUTE_ALT_MIN.n: Parachute min altitude in meters above home
CHUTE_ALT_MIN.d:
Parachute min altitude above home.  Parachute will not be released below this altitude.  0 to disable alt check.

范围: 0 … 32000

CHUTE_CRT_SINK.n: Critical sink speed rate in m/s to trigger emergency parachute
CHUTE_CRT_SINK.d:
Release parachute when critical sink rate is reached

范围: 0 … 15

CHUTE_DELAY_MS.d:
Delay in millseconds between motor stop and chute release

范围: 0 … 5000

CHUTE_ENABLED.d:
Parachute release enabled or disabled

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

CHUTE_OPTIONS.d:
Optional behaviour for parachute

位定义:
  位0: hold open forever after release
  位1: skip disarm before parachute release

CHUTE_SERVO_OFF.d:
Parachute Servo PWM value in microseconds when parachute is not released

范围: 1000 … 2000

CHUTE_SERVO_ON.d:
Parachute Servo PWM value in microseconds when parachute is released

范围: 1000 … 2000

CHUTE_TYPE.n: Parachute release mechanism type (relay or servo)
CHUTE_TYPE.d:
Parachute release mechanism type (relay number in versions prior to 4.5, or servo). Values 0-3 all are relay. Relay number used for release is set by RELAYx_FUNCTION in 4.5 or later.

取值:
  0: Relay
  10: Servo

CIRCLE_OPTIONS.d:
0:Enable or disable using the pitch/roll stick control circle mode's radius and rate

位定义:
  位0: manual control
  位1: face direction of travel
  位2: Start at center rather than on perimeter
  位3: Make Mount ROI the center of the circle

CIRCLE_RADIUS_M.d:
Radius of the circle the vehicle will fly when in Circle flight mode

范围: 0 … 2000

CIRCLE_RATE.d:
Circle mode's maximum turn rate in deg/sec.  Positive to turn clockwise, negative for counter clockwise. Final circle rate is also limited by speed and acceleration settings.

范围: -90 … 90

COMPASS_AUTODEC.d:
Enable or disable the automatic calculation of the declination based on gps location

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

COMPASS_AUTO_ROT.d:
When enabled this will automatically check the orientation of compasses on successful completion of compass calibration. If set to 2 then external compasses will have their orientation automatically corrected.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: CheckOnly
  2: CheckAndFix
  3: use same tolerance to auto rotate 45 deg rotations

COMPASS_CAL_FIT.d:
This controls the fitness level required for a successful compass calibration. A lower value makes for a stricter fit (less likely to pass). This is the value used for the primary magnetometer. Other magnetometers get double the value.

范围: 4 … 32
取值:
  16: Default
  32: Relaxed
  4: Very Strict
  8: Strict

COMPASS_CUS_PIT.d:
Compass mounting position pitch offset. Positive values = pitch up, negative values = pitch down. This parameter is only used when COMPASS_ORIENT/2/3 is set to CUSTOM.

范围: -180 … 180

COMPASS_CUS_ROLL.d:
Compass mounting position roll offset. Positive values = roll right, negative values = roll left. This parameter is only used when COMPASS_ORIENT/2/3 is set to CUSTOM.

范围: -180 … 180

COMPASS_CUS_YAW.d:
Compass mounting position yaw offset. Positive values = yaw right, negative values = yaw left. This parameter is only used when COMPASS_ORIENT/2/3 is set to CUSTOM.

范围: -180 … 180

COMPASS_DEC.d:
An angle to compensate between the true north and magnetic north

范围: -3.142 … 3.142

COMPASS_DEV_ID.d: Compass device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID2.d: Second compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID3.d: Third compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID4.d: Extra 4th compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID5.d: Extra 5th compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID6.d: Extra 6th compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID7.d: Extra 7th compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DEV_ID8.d: Extra 8th compass's device id.  Automatically detected, do not set manually

COMPASS_DIA2_X.d: DIA_X in the compass2 soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA2_Y.d: DIA_Y in the compass2 soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA2_Z.d: DIA_Z in the compass2 soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA3_X.d: DIA_X in the compass3 soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA3_Y.d: DIA_Y in the compass3 soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA3_Z.d: DIA_Z in the compass3 soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA_X.d: DIA_X in the compass soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA_Y.d: DIA_Y in the compass soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DIA_Z.d: DIA_Z in the compass soft-iron calibration matrix: [[DIA_X, ODI_X, ODI_Y], [ODI_X, DIA_Y, ODI_Z], [ODI_Y, ODI_Z, DIA_Z]]

COMPASS_DISBLMSK.d:
This is a bitmask of driver types to disable. If a driver type is set in this mask then that driver will not try to find a sensor at startup

位定义:
  位0: HMC5883
  位1: LSM303D
  位2: AK8963
  位3: BMM150
  位4: LSM9DS1
  位5: LIS3MDL
  位6: AK0991x
  位7: IST8310
  位8: ICM20948
  位9: MMC3416
  位11: DroneCAN
  位12: QMC5883
  位14: MAG3110
  位15: IST8308
  位16: RM3100
  位17: MSP
  位18: ExternalAHRS
  位19: MMC5XX3
  位20: QMC5883P
  位21: BMM350
  位22: IIS2MDC
  位23: LIS2MDL

COMPASS_ENABLE.d:
Setting this to Enabled(1) will enable the compass. Setting this to Disabled(0) will disable the compass. Note that this is separate from COMPASS_USE. This will enable the low level senor, and will enable logging of magnetometer data. To use the compass for navigation you must also set COMPASS_USE to 1.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

COMPASS_EXTERN2.n: Compass2 is attached via an external cable
COMPASS_EXTERN2.d:
Configure second compass so it is attached externally. This is auto-detected on most boards. If set to 0 or 1 then auto-detection by bus connection can override the value. If set to 2 then auto-detection will be disabled.

取值:
  0: Internal
  1: External
  2: ForcedExternal

COMPASS_EXTERN3.n: Compass3 is attached via an external cable
COMPASS_EXTERN3.d:
Configure third compass so it is attached externally. This is auto-detected on most boards. If set to 0 or 1 then auto-detection by bus connection can override the value. If set to 2 then auto-detection will be disabled.

取值:
  0: Internal
  1: External
  2: ForcedExternal

COMPASS_EXTERNAL.n: Compass is attached via an external cable
COMPASS_EXTERNAL.d:
Configure compass so it is attached externally. This is auto-detected on most boards. Set to 1 if the compass is externally connected. When externally connected the COMPASS_ORIENT option operates independently of the AHRS_ORIENTATION board orientation option. If set to 0 or 1 then auto-detection by bus connection can override the value. If set to 2 then auto-detection will be disabled.

取值:
  0: Internal
  1: External
  2: ForcedExternal

COMPASS_FLTR_RNG.n: Range in which sample is accepted
COMPASS_FLTR_RNG.d:
This sets the range around the average value that new samples must be within to be accepted. This can help reduce the impact of noise on sensors that are on long I2C cables. The value is a percentage from the average value. A value of zero disables this filter.

范围: 0 … 100

COMPASS_LEARN.d:
Enable or disable the automatic learning of compass offsets. You can enable learning either using a compass-only method that is suitable only for fixed wing aircraft or using the offsets learnt by the active EKF state estimator. If this option is enabled then the learnt offsets are saved when you disarm the vehicle. If InFlight learning is enabled then the compass with automatically start learning once a flight starts (must be armed). While InFlight learning is running you cannot use position control modes.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  2: EKF-Learning
  3: InFlight-Learning

COMPASS_MOT2_X.n: Motor interference compensation to compass2 for body frame X axis
COMPASS_MOT2_X.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to compass2's x-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_MOT2_Y.n: Motor interference compensation to compass2 for body frame Y axis
COMPASS_MOT2_Y.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to compass2's y-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_MOT2_Z.n: Motor interference compensation to compass2 for body frame Z axis
COMPASS_MOT2_Z.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to compass2's z-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_MOT3_X.n: Motor interference compensation to compass3 for body frame X axis
COMPASS_MOT3_X.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to compass3's x-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_MOT3_Y.n: Motor interference compensation to compass3 for body frame Y axis
COMPASS_MOT3_Y.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to compass3's y-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_MOT3_Z.n: Motor interference compensation to compass3 for body frame Z axis
COMPASS_MOT3_Z.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to compass3's z-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_MOTCT.d:
Set motor interference compensation type to disabled, throttle or current.  Do not change manually.

取值:
  0: Disabled

COMPASS_MOT_Z.d:
Multiplied by the current throttle and added to the compass's z-axis values to compensate for motor interference (Offset per Amp or at Full Throttle)

范围: -1000 … 1000

COMPASS_OPTIONS.d:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the compass

位定义:

  位1: Allow missing DroneCAN compasses to be automaticaly replaced (calibration still required)

COMPASS_ORIENT.d:
The orientation of the first external compass relative to the vehicle frame. This value will be ignored unless this compass is set as an external compass. When set correctly in the northern hemisphere, pointing the nose and right side down should increase the MagX and MagY values respectively. Rolling the vehicle upside down should decrease the MagZ value. For southern hemisphere, switch increase and decrease. NOTE: For internal compasses, AHRS_ORIENT is used. The label for each option is specified in the order of rotations for that orientation. Firmware versions 4.2 and prior can use a CUSTOM (100) rotation to set the COMPASS_CUS_ROLL/PIT/YAW angles for Compass orientation. Later versions provide two general custom rotations which can be used, Custom 1 and Custom 2, with CUST_1_ROLL/PIT/YAW or CUST_2_ROLL/PIT/YAW angles.

ACRO_BAL_PITCH.d:
rate at which pitch angle returns to level in acro and sport mode.  A higher value causes the vehicle to return to level faster. For helicopter sets the decay rate of the virtual flybar in the pitch axis. A higher value causes faster decay of desired to actual attitude.

范围: 0 … 3

ACRO_BAL_ROLL.d:
rate at which roll angle returns to level in acro and sport mode.  A higher value causes the vehicle to return to level faster. For helicopter sets the decay rate of the virtual flybar in the roll axis. A higher value causes faster decay of desired to actual attitude.

范围: 0 … 3

ACRO_OPTIONS.d:
A range of options that can be applied to change acro mode behaviour. Air-mode enables ATC_THR_MIX_MAN at all times (air-mode has no effect on helicopters). Rate Loop Only disables the use of angle stabilization and uses angular rate stabilization only.

位定义:
  位0: Air-mode
  位1: Rate Loop Only

ACRO_RP_EXPO.d:
Acro roll/pitch Expo to allow faster rotation when stick at edges

范围: -0.5 … 0.95
取值:
  0: Disabled
  0.1: Very Low
  0.2: Low
  0.3: Medium
  0.4: High
  0.5: Very High

ACRO_RP_RATE.d:
Acro mode maximum roll and pitch rate.  Higher values mean faster rate of rotation

范围: 1 … 1080

ACRO_RP_RATE_TC.n: Acro roll/pitch rate control input time constant
ACRO_RP_RATE_TC.d:
Acro roll and pitch rate control input time constant.  Low numbers lead to sharper response, higher numbers to softer response

范围: 0 … 1
取值:
  0.05: Very Crisp
  0.1: Crisp
  0.15: Medium
  0.2: Soft
  0.5: Very Soft

ACRO_TRAINER.d:
Type of trainer used in acro mode

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Leveling
  2: Leveling and Limited

ACRO_Y_EXPO.d:
Acro yaw expo to allow faster rotation when stick at edges

范围: -1.0 … 0.95
取值:
  0: Disabled
  0.1: Very Low
  0.2: Low
  0.3: Medium
  0.4: High
  0.5: Very High

ACRO_Y_RATE.d:
Acro mode maximum yaw rate.  Higher value means faster rate of rotation

范围: 1 … 360

ACRO_Y_RATE_TC.n: Acro yaw rate control input time constant
ACRO_Y_RATE_TC.d:
Acro yaw rate control input time constant.  Low numbers lead to sharper response, higher numbers to softer response

范围: 0 … 1
取值:
  0.05: Very Crisp
  0.1: Crisp
  0.15: Medium
  0.2: Soft
  0.5: Very Soft

AUTO_OPTIONS.d:
A range of options that can be applied to change auto mode behaviour. Allow Arming allows the copter to be armed in Auto. Allow Takeoff Without Raising Throttle allows takeoff without the pilot having to raise the throttle. Ignore pilot yaw overrides the pilot's yaw stick being used while in auto.

位定义:
  位0: Allow Arming
  位1: Allow Takeoff Without Raising Throttle
  位2: Ignore pilot yaw
  位7: Allow weathervaning

DEV_OPTIONS.d:
Bitmask of developer options. The meanings of the bit fields in this parameter may vary at any time. Developers should check the source code for current meaning

位定义:
  位0: ADSBMavlinkProcessing
  位1: DevOptionVFR_HUDRelativeAlt

DISARM_DELAY.d:
Delay before automatic disarm in seconds after landing touchdown detection. A value of zero disables auto disarm. If Emergency Motor stop active, delay time is half this value.

范围: 0 … 127

ESC_CALIBRATION.d:
Controls whether ArduCopter will enter ESC calibration on the next restart.  Do not adjust this parameter manually.

取值:
  0: Normal Start-up
  1: Start-up in ESC Calibration mode if throttle high
  2: Start-up in ESC Calibration mode regardless of throttle
  3: Start-up and automatically calibrate ESCs
  9: Disabled

FLIGHT_OPTIONS.d:
Flight mode specific options

位定义:
  位0: Rudder mixing in direct flight modes only (Manual/Stabilize/Acro)
  位1: Use centered throttle in Cruise or FBWB to indicate trim airspeed
  位2: Disable attitude check for takeoff arming
  位3: Force target airspeed to trim airspeed in Cruise or FBWB
  位4: Climb to RTL_ALTITUDE before turning for RTL
  位5: Enable yaw damper in acro mode
  位6: Suppress speed scaling during auto takeoffs to be 1 or less to prevent oscillations without airspeed sensor.
  位7: EnableDefaultAirspeed for takeoff
  位8: Remove the PTCH_TRIM_DEG on the GCS horizon
  位9: Remove the PTCH_TRIM_DEG on the OSD horizon
  位10: Adjust mid-throttle to be TRIM_THROTTLE in non-auto throttle modes except MANUAL
  位11: Disable suppression of fixed wing rate gains in ground mode
  位12: Enable FBWB style loiter altitude control
  位13: Indicate takeoff waiting for neutral rudder with flight control surfaces
  位14: In AUTO - climb to next waypoint altitude immediately instead of linear climb
  位15: Enable autoflap in manual modes and use minimum of target and actual speed for flap setting
  位16: Enable full aerodynamic load factor-based roll limits when an airspeed sensor is enabled and AIRSPEED_STALL is set

FSTRATE_DIV.d:
Fast rate thread divisor used to control the maximum fast rate update rate. The actual rate is the gyro rate in Hz divided by this value. This value is scaled depending on the configuration of FSTRATE_ENABLE.

范围: 1 … 10

FSTRATE_ENABLE.d:
Enable the fast Rate thread. In the default case the fast rate divisor, which controls the update frequency of the thread, is dynamically scaled from FSTRATE_DIV to avoid overrun in the gyro sample buffer and main loop slow-downs. Other values can be selected to fix the divisor to FSTRATE_DIV on arming or always.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled-Dynamic
  2: Enabled-FixedWhenArmed
  3: Enabled-Fixed

FS_CRASH_CHECK.d:
This enables automatic crash checking. When enabled the motors will disarm if a crash is detected.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Warn only
  2: Disarm

FS_DR_ENABLE.d:
Failsafe action taken immediately as deadreckoning starts. Deadreckoning starts when EKF loses position and velocity source and relies only on wind estimates

取值:
  0: Disabled/NoAction
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL

FS_DR_TIMEOUT.d:
DeadReckoning is available for this many seconds after losing position and/or velocity source.  After this timeout elapses the EKF failsafe will trigger in modes requiring a position estimate

范围: 0 … 120

FS_EKF_ACTION.d:
Controls the action that will be taken when an EKF failsafe is invoked

取值:
  0: Report only
  1: Switch to Land mode if current mode requires position
  2: Switch to AltHold mode if current mode requires position
  3: Switch to Land mode from all modes

FS_EKF_FILT.d:
EKF Failsafe filter cutoff frequency. EKF variances are filtered using this value to avoid spurious failsafes from transient high variances. A higher value means the failsafe is more likely to trigger.

范围: 0 … 10

FS_EKF_THRESH.d:
Allows setting the maximum acceptable compass, velocity, position and height variances. Used in arming check and EKF failsafe.

范围: 0.0 … 1.0
取值:
  0: Disabled
  0.6: Strict
  0.8: Default
  1.0: Relaxed

FS_GCS_ENABLE.d:
Controls whether failsafe will be invoked (and what action to take) when connection with Ground station is lost for at least 5 seconds. See FS_OPTIONS param for additional actions, or for cases allowing Mission continuation, when GCS failsafe is enabled.

取值:
  0: Disabled/NoAction
  1: RTL
  2: RTL or Continue with Mission in Auto Mode (Removed in 4.0+-see FS_OPTIONS)
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Land
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land

FS_GCS_TIMEOUT.d:
Timeout before triggering the GCS failsafe

范围: 2 … 120

FS_OPTIONS.d:
Bitmask of additional options for battery, radio, & GCS failsafes. 0 disables all options.

位定义:
  位0: Continue if in Auto on RC failsafe
  位1: Continue if in Auto on GCS failsafe
  位2: Continue if in Guided on RC failsafe
  位3: Continue if landing on any failsafe
  位4: Continue if in pilot controlled modes on GCS failsafe
  位5: Release Gripper

FS_THR_ENABLE.d:
The throttle failsafe allows you to configure a software failsafe activated by a setting on the throttle input channel

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled always RTL
  2: Enabled Continue with Mission in Auto Mode (Removed in 4.0+)
  3: Enabled always Land
  4: Enabled always SmartRTL or RTL
  5: Enabled always SmartRTL or Land
  6: Enabled Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Enabled always Brake or Land

FS_THR_VALUE.d:
The PWM level in microseconds on channel 3 below which throttle failsafe triggers

范围: 910 … 1100

FS_VIBE_ENABLE.d:
This enables the vibration failsafe which will use modified altitude estimation and control during high vibrations

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

GCS_PID_MASK.d:
bitmask of PIDs to send MAVLink PID_TUNING messages for

位定义:
  位0: Steering
  位1: Throttle
  位2: Pitch
  位3: Left Wheel
  位4: Right Wheel
  位5: Sailboat Heel
  位6: Velocity North
  位7: Velocity East

GND_EFFECT_COMP.d:
Ground Effect Compensation Enable/Disable

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled

GPS_HDOP_GOOD.d:
GPS Hdop value at or below this value represent a good position.  Used for pre-arm checks

范围: 100 … 900

GUID_OPTIONS.d:
Options that can be applied to change guided mode behaviour

位定义:
  位0: Allow Arming from Transmitter
  位2: Ignore pilot yaw
  位3: SetAttitudeTarget interprets Thrust As Thrust
  位4: Do not stabilize PositionXY
  位5: Do not stabilize VelocityXY
  位6: Waypoint navigation used for position targets
  位7: Allow weathervaning

GUID_TIMEOUT.d:
Guided mode timeout after which vehicle will stop or return to level if no updates are received from caller. Only applicable during any combination of velocity, acceleration, angle control, and/or angular rate control

范围: 0.1 … 5

INITIAL_MODE.d:
This selects the mode to start in on boot. This is useful for when you want to start in AUTO mode on boot without a receiver.

取值:
  0: Manual
  1: CIRCLE
  10: Auto
  11: RTL
  12: Loiter
  13: TAKEOFF
  14: AVOID_ADSB
  15: Guided
  17: QSTABILIZE
  18: QHOVER
  19: QLOITER
  2: STABILIZE
  20: QLAND
  21: QRTL
  22: QAUTOTUNE
  23: QACRO
  24: THERMAL
  25: Loiter to QLand
  26: AUTOLAND
  3: TRAINING
  4: ACRO
  5: FBWA
  6: FBWB
  7: CRUISE
  8: AUTOTUNE

LAND_REPOSITION.d:
Enables user input during LAND mode, the landing phase of RTL, and auto mode landings.

取值:
  0: No repositioning
  1: Repositioning

LOG_BITMASK.d:
Bitmap of what on-board log types to enable. This value is made up of the sum of each of the log types you want to be saved. It is usually best just to enable all basiclog types by setting this to 65535. Note that if you want to reduce log sizes you should consider using LOG_FILE_RATEMAX instead of disabling logging items with this parameter.

位定义:
  位0: Fast Attitude
  位1: Medium Attitude
  位2: GPS
  位3: System Performance
  位4: Control Tuning
  位5: Navigation Tuning
  位6: RC input
  位7: IMU
  位8: Mission Commands
  位9: Battery Monitor
  位10: RC output
  位11: Optical Flow
  位12: PID
  位13: Compass
  位15: Camera
  位17: Motors
  位18: Fast IMU
  位19: Raw IMU
  位20: Video Stabilization
  位21: Fast harmonic notch logging

PHLD_BRK_RATE.d:
PosHold flight mode's rotation rate during braking in deg/sec

范围: 4 … 12

PILOT_ACC_Z.d:
The vertical acceleration used when pilot is controlling the altitude

范围: 0.5 … 5

PILOT_SPD_DN.d:
The maximum vertical descending velocity the pilot may request in m/s.  If 0 PILOT_SPD_UP value is used.

范围: 0 … 5

PILOT_SPD_UP.d:
The maximum vertical ascending velocity the pilot may request in m/s

范围: 0.5 … 5

PILOT_THR_BHV.d:
Bitmask containing various throttle stick options. TX with sprung throttle can set PILOT_THR_BHV to "1" so motor feedback when landed starts from mid-stick instead of bottom of stick.

位定义:
  位0: Feedback from mid stick
  位1: High throttle cancels landing
  位2: Disarm on land detection

PILOT_THR_FILT.d:
Throttle filter cutoff (Hz) - active whenever altitude control is inactive - 0 to disable

范围: 0 … 10

PILOT_TKO_ALT_M.d:
Altitude that altitude control modes will climb to when a takeoff is triggered with the throttle stick.

范围: 0.0 … 10.0

PILOT_Y_EXPO.d:
Pilot controlled yaw expo to allow faster rotation when stick at edges

范围: -0.5 … 1.0
取值:
  0: Disabled
  0.1: Very Low
  0.2: Low
  0.3: Medium
  0.4: High
  0.5: Very High

PILOT_Y_RATE.d:
Pilot controlled yaw rate max.  Used in all pilot controlled modes except Acro

范围: 1 … 360

PILOT_Y_RATE_TC.n: Pilot yaw rate control input time constant
PILOT_Y_RATE_TC.d:
Pilot yaw rate control input time constant.  Low numbers lead to sharper response, higher numbers to softer response

范围: 0 … 1
取值:
  0.05: Very Crisp
  0.1: Crisp
  0.15: Medium
  0.2: Soft
  0.5: Very Soft

PLDP_DELAY.d:
Delay after release, in seconds, before aircraft starts to climb back to starting altitude.

范围: 0 … 120

PLDP_RNG_MAX.n: Payload Place maximum range finder altitude
PLDP_RNG_MAX.d:
Maximum range finder altitude in m to trigger payload touchdown, set to zero to disable.

范围: 0 … 100

PLDP_SPEED_DN.d:
The maximum vertical decent velocity in m/s. If 0 LAND_SPD_MS value is used.

范围: 0 … 5

PLDP_THRESH.d:
Ratio of vertical thrust during decent below which payload touchdown will trigger.

范围: 0.5 … 0.9

RC_SPEED.d:
This is the speed in Hertz that your ESCs will receive updates

范围: 50 … 490

RNGFND_FILT.d:
Rangefinder filter to smooth distance.  Set to zero to disable filtering

范围: 0 … 5

RTL_ALT_TYPE.d:
RTL altitude type.  Set to 1 for Terrain following during RTL and then set WP_RFND_USE=1 to use rangefinder or WP_RFND_USE=0 to use Terrain database

取值:
  0: Relative to Home
  1: Terrain

RTL_CONE_SLOPE.d:
Defines a cone above home which determines maximum climb

范围: 0 … 10.0
取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Shallow
  3: Steep

RTL_LOIT_TIME.d:
Time (in milliseconds) to loiter above home before beginning final descent

范围: 0 … 60000

RTL_OPTIONS.d:
Options that can be applied to change RTL mode behaviour

位定义:
  位2: Ignore pilot yaw

SIMPLE.d:
Bitmask which holds which flight modes use simple heading mode (eg bit 0 = 1 means Flight Mode 0 uses simple mode). The bitmask is for flightmode switch positions.

位定义:
  位0: SwitchPos1
  位1: SwitchPos2
  位2: SwitchPos3
  位3: SwitchPos4
  位4: SwitchPos5
  位5: SwitchPos6

SUPER_SIMPLE.d:
Bitmask to enable Super Simple mode for some flight modes. Setting this to Disabled(0) will disable Super Simple Mode. The bitmask is for flight mode switch positions

位定义:
  位0: SwitchPos1
  位1: SwitchPos2
  位2: SwitchPos3
  位3: SwitchPos4
  位4: SwitchPos5
  位5: SwitchPos6

SURFTRAK_MODE.d:
set which surface to track in surface tracking

取值:
  0: Do not track
  1: Ground
  2: Ceiling

SURFTRAK_TC.d:
Time to achieve 63.2% of the surface altitude measurement change.  If 0 filtering is disabled

范围: 0 … 5

THROW_ALT_ACSND.n: Throw mode target altitude to ascsend
THROW_ALT_ACSND.d: Target altitude to ascend during a throw upwards (must be positive). This allows for rapidly clearing surrounding obstacles.

THROW_ALT_DCSND.n: Throw mode target altitude to descend
THROW_ALT_DCSND.d: Target altitude to descend during a drop, (must be positive). This allows for rapidly clearing surrounding obstacles.

THROW_ALT_MAX.d: Maximum altitude under which Throw mode will detect a throw or a drop - 0 to disable the check

THROW_ALT_MIN.d: Minimum altitude above which Throw mode will detect a throw or a drop - 0 to disable the check

THROW_MOT_START.n: Start motors before throwing is detected
THROW_MOT_START.d:
Used by Throw mode. Controls whether motors will run at the speed set by MOT_SPIN_MIN or will be stopped when armed and waiting for the throw.

取值:
  0: Stopped
  1: Running

THROW_NEXTMODE.d:
Vehicle will switch to this mode after the throw is successfully completed.  Default is to stay in throw mode (18)

取值:
  17: Brake
  18: Throw
  3: Auto
  4: Guided
  5: LOITER
  6: RTL
  9: Land

THROW_TYPE.d:
Used by Throw mode. Specifies whether Copter is thrown upward or dropped.

取值:
  0: Upward Throw
  1: Drop

THR_DZ.d:
The deadzone above and below mid throttle in PWM microseconds. Used in AltHold, Loiter, PosHold flight modes

范围: 0 … 300

TKOFF_RPM_MAX.d:
Takeoff is not permitted until motors report no more than this RPM.  Set to zero to disable check

范围: 0 … 10000

TKOFF_RPM_MIN.d:
Takeoff is not permitted until motors report at least this RPM.  Set to zero to disable check

范围: 0 … 10000

TKOFF_SLEW_TIME.n: Slew time of throttle during take-off
TKOFF_SLEW_TIME.d:
Time to slew the throttle from minimum to maximum while checking for a successful takeoff.

范围: 0.25 … 5.0

TKOFF_THR_MAX.n: Takeoff maximum throttle during take-off ramp up
TKOFF_THR_MAX.d:
Takeoff maximum throttle allowed before controllers assume the aircraft is airborne during the takeoff process.

范围: 0.0 … 0.9

  14: AltHold kP
  21: Rate Roll/Pitch kD
